creator: peter@simons-rock.edu
text:
On 2009-02-09 10:42:52PM -0500, Peter C. Lai wrote:
> Heads UP: Pending API Bump in databases/freetds affects:
> 
> databases/ruby-sybct (ports@logvinov.com)
> 
> See attached diff for the patch relevant to your port.
> 
> Thanks
> -- 

> --- databases/ruby-sybct/Makefile.dist	2009-02-09 16:49:30.000000000 -0500
> +++ databases/ruby-sybct/Makefile	2009-02-09 17:12:01.000000000 -0500
> @@ -16,7 +16,7 @@
>  MAINTAINER=	ports@logvinov.com
>  COMMENT=	Ruby module for accessing Sybase databases
>  
> -LIB_DEPENDS=	tds.5:${PORTSDIR}/databases/freetds
> +LIB_DEPENDS=	ct:${PORTSDIR}/databases/freetds
>  
>  USE_RUBY=	yes
>  USE_RUBY_EXTCONF=	yes

Please also approve: http://people.freebsd.org/~beech/diffs/ruby-sybct.diff
for freetds api bump.
--
